content:
Cimbing was so good. Has been 3 weeks. I had a great time even though I was super tired. Flashed some V6 and made eyes with a cutie, still to shy to say anything but next time for sure. I've got the mindset now. Manifestation is working, I just need action on my end. 
Now I'm home, everyone is asleep. It's raining gently so I'm finishing off some work. Having a Vodka RTD and doing some journalling. Life is good. Maybe I need to sleep less so I have more moments to myself like this. Hmmm. 
Mushroom hunting this weekend too probably. I'm pretty happy with life right now. Going to ride the high for a while then meditate and sleep, maybe try to lucid dream again if the buzz hasn't worn off.
